did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Baptist Church of Tyrone and Jersey record book,

origination.label: Creator:
origination.corpname: Baptist Church of Tyrone and Jersey (Tyrone, N.Y.)

did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: This church was constituted as the Baptist Church of Jersey on November 22, 1815 with twelve members. One of the members, Phineas Fullerton was licensed to preach, and supplied the pulpit part time for a few years, but in 1818 he was excluded for intemperance. The Elder Thomas Brown supplied the church until 1824. In 1823 the name was changed to the Jersey and Tyrone Church, under which name it incorporated in 1826. In 1861 "Jersey" was dropped.

The church occupied a union church half-time from its construction in 1830 until erection of a church in West Village in 1849. The union edifice burned in 1851. See The History of Schuyler County p. 221 for a list of pastors and statistics from 1879.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Volume includes membership lists for male and female members (1860, 1866), church covenant and special meeting minutes (1848-1872) which deal with discipline, the appointment of pastors, accepting and dismissing members, and the appointment of representatives to the association, and the peace of the church. Items of note include:5 p., List of male members with remarks. 1860. 8 p., List of female members with remarks. 1860. 5 p., List of male members with remarks. 1866. 8 p., List of female members with remarks. 1866.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: Baptist Church of Tyrone and Jersey (Tyrone, N.Y.)

did.unittitle: Record of Baptist Church of Tyrone and Jersey

scopecontent.p: Plans to build a meeting house.
Decision of April 30, 1847 regarding secret societies is rescinded.
The church calls a council to solve difficulty with an elder, charged with lying
Council expels and defrocks the elder, a former pastor.
Statistics on membership are included after 1869.
Program for the Tyrone United Methodist Church.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Baptist Church of Tyrone and Jersey record book, #6075. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
